positioning.targetUser: Busy solo cooks with pantry odds and ends
positioning.pain: They waste food because planning from leftovers is mentally heavy
positioning.corePromise: Turn what is already in the pantry into a calm 3-day meal plan
positioning.competitorContrast: Less database-heavy than calorie trackers; more actionable than recipe bookmarks

monetization.thesis: Free 3-day plans build trust; Pro unlocks saved plans and grocery export.

pricePoints.rationale: Comparable meal planning apps cluster around $3.99-$7.99/month.
